feed.title: SAP Community - PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance
feed.subtitle: PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: External Refurbishment work order cost calculation
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I have refurbished a material from valuation type C(Defective) to valuation type B(refurbished).

B Refurbished Moving Average Price 3000 Stock 1

C  Defective Moving Average Price 1000 Stock 1

Price of service 500

Why the gain loss is showing as -1500 instead of 0. As the amount spent on refurbishment and the C condition material are both completely consumed in inventory at B condition?

Regards,

Jaya

entry.title: Regarding closing of printing of work permit
entry.content: Hello,How to close the print of work permit without approval of SCI?How to omplement this setting so that mo body shall be able to print a permit wihtout approval of safety control and inspection ?

entry.title: End-to-End Maintenance Execution Using SAP Fiori Apps in SAP S/4HANA – A Phase-Wise Approach
entry.content:
Introduction:
In modern asset-intensive industries, the reliability and availability of technical assets directly impact business performance. SAP Plant Maintenance (SAP PM) in S/4HANA, integrated with SAP Fiori, transforms the traditional maintenance execution process into a user-centric, phase-wise digital journey.

This blog outlines the End-to-End Maintenance Execution Cycle using standard SAP Fiori apps, structured by maintenance phases – from initiation to completion.

Maintenance Execution Phases & SAP Fiori Apps:

Below is a breakdown of the 9 maintenance phases, each mapped with relevant SAP Fiori applications used in SAP S/4HANA:

1. Initiation Phase – Raise Maintenance Request

  • App:

    • Create Maintenance Request (F1511A)
      https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('F1511A')/S30PCE

      Fiori ID: F1511A

    • My Maintenance Requests (F4513)
      https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('F4513')/S30PCE

      Fiori ID: F4513

  • Business Role: Technician / Operator

  • Purpose: Report asset breakdown, malfunction, or maintenance need.

2. Screening Phase – Request Evaluation

  • App:

    • Screen Maintenance Request (F4072)
      https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('F4072')/S30PCE

      Fiori ID: F4072 

  • Business Role: Maintenance Supervisor

  • Purpose: Validate, prioritize, and convert valid requests into maintenance notifications.

3. Planning Phase – Notification Planning

  • App:

    • Find Maintenance Notification (F2071)
      https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('F2071')/S30PCE

      Fiori ID: F2071

  • Business Role: Maintenance Planner

  • Purpose: Plan operations, materials, required components, work centers, and document scope.

4. Approval Phase – Workflow Approval

  • App:

    • My Inbox (F0862)
      https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('F0862')/S26OP

      Fiori ID: F0862

       

       

  • Business Role: Department Manager / Approver

  • Purpose: Approve maintenance plans based on cost, scope, and operational needs.

5. Preparation Phase – Capacity Planning

  • Apps:

    • Manage Maintenance Planning Buckets (F3888)
      https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('F3888')/S30PCE

      Fiori ID: F3888

    • Manage Maintenance Buckets (F4073)
      https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('F4073')/S30PCE 

      Fiori ID: F4073

       

  • Business Role: Maintenance Planner

  • Purpose: Review capacity, allocate resources into planning buckets.

6. Scheduling Phase – Order Scheduling

  • App:

    • Find Maintenance Order (F2175)
      https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('F2175')/S30PCE

      Fiori ID: F2175

       

  • Business Role: Scheduler

  • Purpose: Schedule maintenance orders against available capacity and resource windows.

7. Execution Phase – Perform Maintenance

  • App:

    • Perform Maintenance Jobs (F5104A)
      https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('F5104A')/S30PCE

      Fiori ID: F5104A

       

  • Business Role: Maintenance Technician

  • Purpose: Execute job cards, record time confirmations, consumption, and failure causes.

8. Post-Execution Phase – Technical Completion

  • App:

    • Find Maintenance Order (Set to TECO)
      https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('F2175')/S30PCE

      Fiori ID: F2175

       

  • Business Role: Maintenance Supervisor

  • Purpose: Confirm job completion, close technical operations.

9. Completion Phase – Business Closure

  • App:

    • Find Maintenance Order (Set to CLSD)
      https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('F2175')/S30PCE

      Fiori ID: F2175

       

  • Business Role: Maintenance Planner / Controller

  • Purpose: Final financial settlement, order closure, cost analysis.


Business Benefits of Fiori-Based Maintenance Phases:

  • Role-based access & intuitive UI

  • Improved maintenance planning & execution accuracy

  • Faster approvals via integrated workflow

  • Real-time visibility into asset status

  • Seamless collaboration between maintenance teams

Conclusion:
SAP S/4HANA with Fiori delivers an intelligent, mobile-ready, and user-friendly maintenance experience. By aligning the maintenance lifecycle with structured Fiori apps, organizations can reduce asset downtime, streamline approvals, and achieve operational excellence.

entry.title: API_EQUIPMENT - How to Update the custom fields in API using PATCH Operation
entry.content:
As per business requirement, I have added Equipment  field User status ( standard field ) in  Standard API_EQUIPMENT  using CDS extended option.

GET Method : It is fetching the Equipment User status value successfully using Get method via Postman.

PATCH Method:  While Updating the Equipment user status is  getting failed using  Patch Method via Postman.

Kindly suggest me how to update the newly added customized fields value using PATCH Method for API_EQUIPMENT.

 

 

 

Regards,

 

S Surya

entry.title: Issue with Printing Maintenance Order – Blank Screen in IW3D
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I'm trying to print a corrective maintenance order using transaction IW3D. However, when I execute the transaction, the screen appears completely blank, as shown in the attached screenshot.

I’ve already maintained all the necessary standard settings.

Has anyone encountered this issue before or can guide me on how to resolve it?
Any help would be highly appreciated.

Best regards,

entry.title: Clarification on Automatic Update of Requirement Date in Work Order Component Reservation
entry.content:
Description:

We would like to seek clarification regarding the system behavior for the requirement date (RESB-BDATU) when adding components to a maintenance work order.

Scenario:

  1. A maintenance work order is created on 29.08.2014.

  2. One operation (0010) is added along with two stock components.

  3. The order is saved and released, and the system creates reservations with the requirement date defaulted to 29.08.2014 (i.e., the basic start or operation start date).

  4. On 02.09.2014, the user adds another stock component to the same operation (0010).

  5. Upon saving, the system still sets the requirement date as 29.08.2014, even though the component was added on 02.09.2014.

Business Requirement:

The user expects that when a new component is added after initial order creation, the requirement date should default to the date on which the component is added (e.g., 02.09.2014), rather than the order's original start date — and this should happen automatically, without manual input.

Query:

Is it possible in standard SAP to achieve this functionality — where the requirement date for newly added components automatically reflects the current system date (SY-DATUM) at the time of addition, instead of defaulting to the order's basic/operation start date?

If not, please advise whether a standard configuration option or enhancement (user exit/BAdI) is recommended to meet this requirement.

System Info:

  • SAP Module: PM / MM

  • T-Code: IW31 / IW32

  • Relevant Table: RESB (Field: BDATU)

Kindly provide clarification or guidance.

entry.title: Validation to Restrict MIGO Posting to Blocked Storage Locations for Movement Types 561/101
entry.content:
Description:

We require a system validation during MIGO transactions to prevent posting to specific restricted P&M storage locations (e.g., 5000) using movement types 561 (Initial Stock Upload) and 101 (Goods Receipt against PO).

Business Scenario:

Certain storage locations such as 5000 are designated solely for P&M internal use and must not be used for direct stock uploads or goods receipts. However, users are currently able to post stock into these locations via MIGO, which leads to inaccurate stock management.

Transaction Involved:

  • MIGO – Goods Movement

Relevant Movement Types:

  • 561 – Initial Stock Upload

  • 101 – Goods Receipt against Purchase Order

Required Functional Behavior:

During execution of MIGO with movement types 561 or 101:

  • The system should validate the “To Storage Location” (LGORT).

  • If the storage location is 5000, the system should block the posting.

  • A custom error message should be displayed.

Sample Error Message:

“Posting to this storage location is not allowed.”

entry.title: Question regarding Reactive Maintenance (4HH_CA) Minor Work
entry.content:
Hi, this is a question regarding the EAM Minor Work Process.  We have given the authorization for the Maintenance Planner and the Maintenance Supervisor to create minor work maintenance request (Business Catalog SAP_EAM_BC_EXCP_MREQ_MNG_PC restriction type Notification Processing Context IECP_MN.

In the SAP test script for Reactive Maintenance (4HH_CA) section 5.3.1 Minor Work - Create Maintenance Request. The Maintenance Planner creates the minor work maintenance request and once created it is available in the Accepted tab in My Maintenance Request.

In the SAP test script for Reactive Maintenance (4HH_CA) section 5.3.2 Minor Work - Record Malfunction Details. The Maintenance Technician checks the accepted maintenance request and records the malfunction data for the maintenance request created by the planner.  The issue we have is that since the maintenance request for minor work was created by the Maintenance Planner, this request cannot be displayed to the Maintenance Technician.  Our presumption is that you can only see your own maintenance requests in My Maintenance Request.  Can you please confirm that there is an error in the SAP script, or if there is another way for the Maintenance Technician to Record Malfunction details and complete notification for minor work if the maintenance request was completed by the planner or the supervisor role.  Thank you

entry.title: Issue with Direct Printing of SES in ML83 – Spool Request Generated Instead of Direct Print
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support Team,

I am facing an issue with direct printing of Service Entry Sheets (SES) via Transaction ML83.

In some systems (System 1 and System 2), the SES prints directly when executed via ML83. However, in my system, the same transaction only generates a spool request instead of sending the output directly to the printer.

As a result, I need to:

  1. Manually open SP01

  2. Generate the PDF

  3. Then print it separately

This is causing extra steps and delays. I would like to enable direct print functionality through ML83 in my system, just like it works in the other systems.

Enable direct print of SES in ML83 without needing to manually process the spool request through SP01.

Your assistance in resolving this configuration inconsistency is appreciated.

Best regards,
Mohit Mishra

entry.title: Set Default Filter Value for Work Center Category in Create Maintenance Request (F1511A) App
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are using the standard SAP Fiori App "Create Maintenance Request" (F1511A). When user clicks on the value help for the Main Work Center, a dialog opens where they can search using filters such as Work Center, Plant and Work Center Category. 

As part of business requirements, they would like the Work Center Category filter to default to 0005 (Plant Maintenance) each time the value help dialog is opened.

We explored UI adaptation options using SAP Business Application Studio. Checked for controller extensions. 

Is there any supported way to default the Work Center Category filter field to 0005 in the value help dialog for Main Work Center. If yes, kindly advise how we can achieve this.

entry.title: Activate SAP EAM Fiori Apps
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are planning to activate EAM Fiori Apps on S/4 HANA 2023. Do we have to activate Business functions starting with LOG_EAM_SIMPLICITY?

Here are the few from the list of the apps we are trying to activate.

  • Manage Maintenance Notifications and Orders (F4604)
  • Find Maintenance Notification (F2071)
  • Find Technical Object(F2072)

entry.title: Estimated Cost is not editable in Plant Maintenance order after creation of Purchase order.
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

The Estimated Cost is not editable in Plant Maintenance order after creation of Purchase order for respective purchase requisition of the PM order.

As checked in Standard SAP system it is allowing to edit. In our system there is no custom code implemented to prevention of edit.

entry.title: Time confirmation with two assign 2 activity types to a PM work center
entry.content:
Hi PM Experts,

We have this requirement for an unplanned work that you can be able to post time confirmation either in GUI (IW41) or in Fiori Find Maintenance Orders and Operations (Upload Time Confirmation) when you assign 2 activity types (A & B) to a PM Work Center in the Cost Tab under Activity Overview. Both activity types are properly mapped with the Cost Center of the Work Center.

The problem is when you perform time confirmation, it is always proposed the activity types that was entered in the order operation which contains only one operation. Let say Activity Type A was in the order operation but want to post time confirmation for both Activity Type A and B with both the same Work Center.

Hope someone can answer this. Can't seem to find SAP Note regarding this.

Thank you in advance

entry.title: Equipment Long Text in different languages
entry.content:
As we know long text can be added to the Equipment and can be displayed accordingly.

So if a user maintains Equipment long text in language EN why if a user then maintains text in a different language such as German why is the EN text not being displayed?

Is this standard behaviour with long text maintenance in different languages?

entry.title: latest 2025 asset enterprise management certification
entry.content: please suggest latest 2025 asset enterprise management certification ,

entry.title: Inaktive mass maintennce plan in sap
entry.content:
hi,

there is others way to inactive massmaintennce plan in sap?

thanks

entry.title: Work Center used in Resource Scheduling Tool
entry.content:
Hi All, 

Greetings ,

Can anyone please let me know , as support user how can I know what are the work centers used in RSH tool ?

Thanking you .

Mohammed

entry.title: IW32 TECO TAKING QTY BY DEFAULT TO SCRAP
entry.content: when i do the TECO for my repair service order it is taking qty automatically to scrap instead of unrestricted, any idea what i am doing wrong ?

entry.title: in iw31 getting error agreement item contains a different material Message no 06 387
entry.content: in iw31 getting error "agreement item contains a different material" after entering agreement on PM02 key external operation. While debugging i am seeing the material which is checked against the material present on agreement is blank. Where exactly should i fill the material on order so that comparison of it with agreement material wont get failed. Please note i have not checked the subcontracting flag. Does it needs to be checked mandatorily?

entry.title: Closing of printing of work permit without approval
entry.content:
Hi all,

How to close the print of work permit without approval of SCI?How to omplement this setting so that no body shall be able to print a permit withtout approval of safety control and inspection ? If I am using wcm control key in my order (for which work approval and application tab gets automatically created in order scree), how can I able to make the same restriction in printing of permits ?

Best Regards,

M.k.M
